steps.title: Apply the charge threshold
steps.content: The passage says positive charges above a threshold can attract the negatively charged stamens, and queen honeybees exceed that threshold. Any pollinator whose charge also reaches that level should be able to attract the stamens.

steps.title: Reject unsupported charge claims
steps.content: A contradicts the threshold logic by saying a pollinator with a greater maximum charge cannot attract stamens. B invents repulsion by paper wasps. D claims an exact threshold above 200 pC, which the prompt does not establish. The answer is C.
